title: RC-debounced button on STM32
prompt: The pushbutton on my STM32F103 project is bouncing and firmware sees spurious presses. Add hardware debouncing: a pull-up resistor holds the input high when the button is open, the button pulls it to ground when pressed, and an RC low-pass smooths the edge before it reaches the GPIO input. For the bench check, with the button open the debounced input should rest near the 3.3 V rail.
